ogTitle: Olary vs Old Noarlunga: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Olary and Old Noarlunga.
heading: Olary vs Old Noarlunga — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Olary, South Australia and Old Noarlunga, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Olary has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Old Noarlunga (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Olary or Old Noarlunga safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Olary has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Old Noarlunga scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Olary scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Old Noarlunga scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Olary or Old Noarlunga?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Olary has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
